properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Be still, there is a healer His love is deeper than the sea His mercy, it is unfailing His arms are a fortress for the weak

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let faith arise Let faith arise

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I lift my hands to believe again You are my refuge, You are my strength As I pour out my heart, these things I remember You are faithful, God, forever

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Be still, there is a river That flows from Calvary's tree A fountain for the thirsty Pure grace that washes over me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So let faith arise Let faith arise Open my eyes Open my eyes

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I lift my hands to believe again You are my refuge, You are my strength As I pour out my heart, these things I remember You are faithful, God You are faithful, God, forever
